CNN Separation Anxiety, Elon in D.C., Politico\xe2\x80\x99s Profit Playbook

Welcome back to The Daily Courant, your afternoon roundup of Puck\xe2\x80\x99s best new reporting.

First up today, a Zaz -tastic, WBD-themed doubleheader featuring Bill Cohan on the debt-reduction/private equity play hinted at in WBD\xe2\x80\x99s plan to split its streaming business into a separate operating unit, and Dylan Byers \xe2\x80\x99 dispatch on the fate of CNN and how the news is ricocheting through Hudson Yards.

Plus, below the fold: Marion Maneker chronicles the $32 million sale of Judy Garland \xe2\x80\x99s stolen ruby slippers and the exploding market for Hollywood memorabilia. Abby Livingston clocks the rising influence of Silicon Valley technocrats in Trump \xe2\x80\x99s inner circle. And on another rollicking Media Monday episode of The Powers That Be , Jon Kelly connects with Dylan to chew over the latest media industry buzz, from David Zaslav\xe2\x80\x99s sweeping WBD restructuring to the Beltway chatter surrounding big hires at The Washington Post and Politico.

Zaz in Cable Wonderland

WILLIAM D. COHAN

At first blush, WBD\xe2\x80\x99s chief seems to be following Brian Roberts\xe2\x80\x99 \xe2\x80\x9cSpinCo\xe2\x80\x9d strategy for his own declining linear assets. But a closer look at the sheer legal and M&A firepower he\xe2\x80\x99s enlisted reveals a debt-reduction/P.E. play that more closely resembles AT&T\xe2\x80\x99s sale of DirecTV.

A MESSAGE FROM INSTAGRAM

Instagram Teen Accounts: automatic protections for teens

Parents want safer online experiences for their teens. That's why Instagram is introducing Teen Accounts, with automatic protections for who can contact teens and the content they can see.

A key factor: Only parents can approve safety setting changes for teens under 16.


Learn more

Zaz\xe2\x80\x99s CNN Situation Room

DYLAN BYERS

The restructuring of Warner Bros. Discovery, designed to cleave the company\xe2\x80\x99s declining cable assets from its studio and streaming business, has left CNN insiders and executives wondering where the network fits into WBD\xe2\x80\x99s future\xe2\x80\x94or if it does at all.

The Mona Lisa of Memorabilia

MARION MANEKER

The market for pop-cultural artifacts has never been hotter. For some time, there\xe2\x80\x99s been a growing fixation on sports memorabilia and rock god guitars, but the runaway sale of Judy Garland\xe2\x80\x99s ruby slippers brought the point home: When it comes to memorabilia, we\xe2\x80\x99re not in Kansas anymore.

Silicon Valley Goes East

ABBY LIVINGSTON

Elon Musk was only the first pioneer in a mass migration of Trump-friendly tech moguls salting the ground in Washington in advance of a deregulatory assault on the agencies policing crypto and A.I.

Media Monday: WBD\xe2\x80\x99s Potential SpinCo & Politico\xe2\x80\x99s Profit Playbook

JON KELLY & DYLAN BYERS

Jon Kelly connects with Dylan Byers to chew over the latest media industry buzz, starting with David Zaslav\xe2\x80\x99s sweeping WBD restructuring and what this move portends for his cable networks, including CNN. Is Zaslav positioning to spin off these networks, \xc3\xa0 la Brian Roberts\xe2\x80\x99 SpinCo? They also dive into the latest developments at The Washington Post and Politico, and much more.
